base_context.description: The next run will be this leader/base config plus ONLY the JSON changes returned by the advisor.

expected_direction: improve selected objective by changing entry quality/profile selection without starving trades
expected_effect: Should increase or improve charm_wall_breakaway_long participation while preserving its high PnL per exposure and convex payoff. Tradeoff is possible cannibalization or weak wall-chase entries; reject unless total net profit stays >=98% of run_029, total PnL/exposure is flat or better, slow_12h remains 0, and total worst MAE does not deteriorate beyond the leader band.
label: promote
rationale: Use one legal family: batch_d_charm_wall_breakaway_long. The latest squeeze compression failed and a direct squeeze reversion was rejected as duplicate, while broad pullback/1DTE/call-wall tightening has repeatedly damaged profit. Charm-wall breakaway is the cleanest profile-specific expansion candidate after squeeze: high PnL per trade, strong PnL/exposure, no slow trades, and only 7 trades. This is an admission-geometry experiment, not a take-profit compression or global filter.
strategy_plan_next_experiments: Squeeze Convexity Reversion And Continuation Probe
